name: io.github.rozetyp/vuln-intel
title: vuln-intel
description: Agent-native CVE intelligence as a hosted MCP server: ~332k vulnerabilities fused from NVD, CISA KEV, FIRST EPSS, OSV/GHSA and SSVC, ranked exploitation-first, with a CVE-claim fact-checker that catches the CVEs your agent makes up.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Bearer token. Get a free key at https://mcp.rozetyp.com/signup, then send the value: Bearer <your-key>
